task.name: Whisper MP4 Transcription Script
task.description: Create a simple, standalone script to extract audio from an MP4 file and transcribe it using Whisper CLI
task.objective: Create a single, self-contained script to process MP4 video into text transcript
task.details: The script should extract audio from an MP4 file and use Whisper CLI to generate a transcript. It should handle basic error checking and produce helpful output.
requirements: Accept an MP4 file path as input
Process the audio with Whisper CLI
Include basic error handling for missing dependencies or files

dependencies.name: ffmpeg
dependencies.description: Required for extracting audio from video files
